prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年最低位次约5483→5690→6310→7197→5535，整体呈\"后移-大幅回升\"的V型走势；2024年位次后移至7197为近年最高（最易进），2025年大幅前移至55 35，接近2021年水平，显示该校在天津的报考热度回升明显，近两年波动幅度达1662名；该校在天津招生计划持续扩招：2021年32人、2022年35人、2023年39人 、2024年40人、2025年42人；2026年计划增至54人，较2025年扩招12人（增幅约28.6%），扩招幅度为近年最大，对录取位次有显著稀释作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
985工程、 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第51名，较2025年第56名上升5位，排名稳步提升，体现学校综合实力持续增强；2023年声誉偏负面（小语 种专业位次下降6211位），但近年声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第21（较热），综合热度约243万，短视频平台关注度较高，对报考热度有正向推动作用；未见明显投档断档记录。
5 .【优势学科】水产A+、海洋科学A+（均为全国顶尖），生物学A-、食品科学与工程A-；海洋科学、水产等王牌学科与学校特色高度契合，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校相关招生专业（计算机类、电子信息类、自动化等）匹配；天津市2026年高考报名总数约82000 人，较2025年71938人增长约14%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；省控线数据2026年缺失，；该校位于山东青岛，在天津招生计划持续增长，2026年计 划54人创近年新高；作为驻鲁985高校，对天津考生有一定地域吸引力，但非本省高校，地域偏好中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升至5535的强势表现、2026年计 划扩招28.6%的稀释效应、天津市考生总数增长约14%带来的竞争加剧，以及学校软科排名上升和抖音热度较热的正向信号，预计2026年最低录取位次。扩招是主要下拉因素（位次数字增大），考生增加和热度上升形成部分对冲；预测最低位次约6514名，区间6014-7014名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 海洋科学（设有基础学科拔尖计划2.0基地）
- 海洋技术
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 大气科学
- 生物科学类（生态学、生物技术、生物科学）
- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程、微电子科学与工程等）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 会计学（设有国际注册会计师ACCA方向班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 汉语言文学
- 化学
- 药学
- 水产养殖学（教育部卓越农林人才教育培养计划改革试点专业）
- 海洋渔业科学与技术。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约6514名，区间6014-7014名。位次在区间下限6014以内可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（海洋科学、计算机类）；位次在区间中段（约6500名左右）建议以二档专业为主、一 档适度冲刺；位次在区间上限7014附近建议以三档专业保底、二档专业为主力。该校水产、海洋科学为A+王牌学科，但社会热度一般；计算机类、电子信息类虽无A类学科评估， 但社会热度高，竞争可能更激烈。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking approximately changed from 5483 → 5690 → 6310 → 7197 → 5535, showing an overall V-shaped trend of "backward movement - sharp rebound"; in 2024, the ranking moved back to 7197, the highest in recent years (easiest to enter), and in 2025, it moved sharply forward to 5535, close to the 2021 level, indicating a significant rebound in application popularity for this university in Tianjin, with a fluctuation range of 1662 places in the past two years; the university's enrollment plan in Tianjin has been continuously expanding: 32 people in 2021, 35 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 40 in 2024, 42 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 54 people, an expansion of 12 people compared to 2025 (an increase of about 28.6%), the largest expansion in recent years, which has a significant dilution effect on admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 51st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, up 5 places from 56th in 2025, with steadily improving rankings, reflecting the continuous enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength; in 2023, the reputation was somewhat negative (the ranking of minor language majors dropped by 6211 places), but in recent years, the reputation has been stable; Douyin popularity ranking 21st (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 2.43 million, high attention on short video platforms, which positively promotes application popularity; no obvious records of admission gaps.
5. [Advantage Disciplines] Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+ (both top in the country), Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-; marine science, aquaculture and other flagship disciplines are highly aligned with the university's characteristics, strongly attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are highly recommended in social popularity, matching the university's related enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, etc.); the total number of Tianjin college entrance examination registrations in 2026 is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying overall competition; provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; the university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, with a continuously growing enrollment plan in Tianjin, reaching a record high of 54 people in 2026; as a 985 university in Shandong, it has a certain regional appeal to Tianjin candidates, but it is not a local university, so regional preference is neutral.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the ranking rebounding sharply to 5535 in 2025, the dilution effect of a 28.6% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 14% increase in the total number of Tianjin candidates, and the positive signals of the university's rising Soft Science ranking and relatively hot Douyin popularity, the minimum admission ranking for 2026 is predicted. The enrollment expansion is the main downward factor (ranking number increases), while the increase in candidates and rising popularity partially offset it; the predicted minimum ranking is about 6514, with a range of 6014-7014.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Marine Science (with Basic Disciplines Top Talent Training Plan 2.0 Base)
- Marine Technology
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Atmospheric Science
- Biological Sciences (Ecology, Biotechnology, Biological Science)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Accounting (with International Certified Public Accountant ACCA Direction Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chinese Language and Literature
- Chemistry
- Pharmacy
- Aquaculture (Ministry of Education Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Education and Training Plan Reform Pilot Program)
- Marine Fisheries Science and Technology
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 6514, range 6014-7014. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 6014 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Marine Science, Computer Science); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 6500) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors with moderate sprinting for Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of 7014 are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety and Tier 2 majors as the main focus. The university's Aquaculture and Marine Science are A+ flagship disciplines, but their social popularity is average; although Computer Science and Electronic Information do not have A-class discipline evaluations, their social popularity is high, and competition may be more intense.
